top_papers.title: Meta-learning In-Context Enables Training-Free Cross Subject Brain Decoding
top_papers.why_it_matters: Meta-learning In-Context Enables Training-Free Cross Subject Brain Decoding unlocks new capabilities from existing models without any additional training.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: A field-wide goal is to achieve generalizable, cross-subject models.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Prompting.

top_papers.title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
top_papers.why_it_matters: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery advances our understanding of large language models, which are reshaping how we build AI systems and interact with knowledge.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: We present CORAL, the first framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution on open-ended problems.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about LLMs.

top_papers.title: Robustness of Vision Foundation Models to Common Perturbations
top_papers.why_it_matters: Robustness of Vision Foundation Models to Common Perturbations advances machine perception, enabling better visual understanding in real-world applications.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: In this work, we present the first systematic study on foundation models' robustness to such perturbations.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Fine-Tuning.

top_papers.title: GrandCode: Achieving Grandmaster Level in Competitive Programming via Agentic Reinforcement Learning
top_papers.why_it_matters: GrandCode: Achieving Grandmaster Level in Competitive Programming via Agentic Reinforcement Learning contributes to reinforcement learning — a key paradigm for training agents that make sequential decisions.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: In this work, we introduce GrandCode, a multi-agent RL system designed for competitive programming.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about RLHF.

top_papers.title: PanoAir: A Panoramic Visual-Inertial SLAM with Cross-Time Real-World UAV Dataset
top_papers.why_it_matters: PanoAir: A Panoramic Visual-Inertial SLAM with Cross-Time Real-World UAV Dataset represents a meaningful contribution to its field and opens new research directions.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: To achieve accurate and robust pose estimation under such challenging UAV scenarios, we propose a panoramic VI-SLAM…
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Robotics.
